titleStmt.title: SII 37.526: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 526. (A.R. No. B 20 of 1943-44.) Siddāpuram, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab lying near the ruined temple of Aṅkālamma.
This is dated Śaka 1515, Vijaya, Śrāvaṇa śu. 5, Sunday, corresponding to 1593 A.D. July 22.

It registers the confirmation, by Siddha Bhikshāvṛitti-Ayya, of lands and incomes such as Kāṇike, Kappam, Varttana etc. of the temples of Nāgavarapamma, Aṅkālamma and Puṭṭalamma and also the right of supervision over the customary rites in these temples previously made to Guḍivāriyam Channappa by Pedda-Ayya, the former Pontiff, for his having built the temples of Aṅkālamma and later on renovated it and istalled therein a new image. When the temple was desecrated and the image in it broken by the Muhammadans, he substituted new ones for the old articles mudra gaḍa and pāvanālu taken away by the Muhammadans.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhanaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1515 Agunēṁṭi vija
ya saṁvvatsara śrāvaṇa śuddha 5 Ā svasti śrī śrīparvata śrī
svayaṁbhu śrīliṁgga cakravarti śrīmanmallikārjuna mahā
dēva divya śrīpādapadmārādhakulayina śrīkailāsaṁ mīdi dēvāpṛ
dhivi mahāmahatu mukhyamayina śrīvīraśaiva śiddha bhikṣā vritti
Ayyavāru guḍivāriyaṁ ceṁnnappaku yiccina dāna patri krama
meṭlaṁnnanu śidāpurāna Aṁkāḷaṁmmaku kritaṁ pedaAyyavāri kālā
na dēvuḷaṁ gaṭṭiṁcci dēvuni pratiṣṭa cēśina nimityamunnu taruvāta turu
kahāvaḷivacci Ādēvuṁnni chiṁnnaṁ cēśivuṁḍaṁgānu dēvunni śēyiṁcci tirugā
pratiṣṭa śēsina nimityamunnu nāgavarapaṁmmaku pūrvapumudra gaḍapāvanālu
turukalu tīsukapōyivuṁḍaṁgānu tirugasēyiṁcci yiccina nimi
tyamunnu yīdēvaḷaṁku cellivaccē kānike kappālu varttanalu māgaḷaceru
vu venaka velaṁgamānipolāna Aṁkkāḷaṁmmaku cellivaccē varima
ḍistaḷaṁ m 0 . nnu pāṭimīda kuṁmmaraguṁtalastaḷamu m 0 . nnu vu
bhayaṁ m 0 . nnu nāgavarapaṁmmaku cellivaccē Ācāramunnu Ādēvuni gu
ḍi vaḍḍitōṁṭānu puṭṭalaṁmmastaḷaṁ krottaceruvu kriṁda m 0 . Ādēvuniki
cellivaccē kānike kappālunnu Ācāramunnu yidimodalayinavi śrīśailasi
ddāpurālaku cellivaccē yīdēvaḷa Ācārālaku pedatanamunnu satrikāṇayā
cigānu pedaAyyavāru dhāravōśi yicci vuṁḍiri ganaka dhā
ravōsi yistimi ganaka Ā dēvaḷlaku naivēdyadīpārādha vēyiṁcci mīputrapavutra
pāraṁparyaṁgānu Āceṁdrārkkastāyigānu Anubhaviṁcci bratikēdi .
yī dharmānaku yavvaru hāni talacinānu tamatallidaṁḍrādula gaṁgalō caṁ
ppina pāpāna pōvuvāru . śrī śrīṁ jēyunū . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇya
ṁparadattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēttu .
Digital edition of SII 37.526 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
